name: No witnesses to my chemical spill exposure, still claimable?

mainEntity.name: No witnesses to my chemical spill exposure, still claimable?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, your records, medicals, MSDS suffice if consistent.**

Circumstantial evidence works; symptoms timeline key[3][8].

- Incident reports.
- Camera footage.
- Co-worker later statements.

Document solo; doctor corroborates. Winnable[3].
